---
title: "Script"
author: "David"
date: "2026-03-13"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(rvest)
library(dplyr)
library(xml2)
library(stringr)
library(chromote)
```

```{r}

# Retrieve all report links

reports <- read_pc_search_pages("https://www.pc.gov.au/inquiries-and-research/?year=1999%2C2000%2C2001%2C2002%2C2003%2C2004%2C2005%2C2006%2C2007%2C2008%2C2009%2C2010%2C2011%2C2012%2C2013%2C2014%2C2015%2C2016%2C2017%2C2018%2C2019%2C2020%2C2021%2C2022%2C2023%2C2024%2C2025&tab=inquiries", 10) 

read_reports <- read_pc_reports(reports)


# Two things
# Get study report page (append submissions/)
# Get submissions page (append report/)

```



```{r}

menntaal <- read_pc_report_submissions("https://www.pc.gov.au/inquiries-and-research/water-reform-2024/submissions/")
prod <- read_pc_report_submissions("https://www.pc.gov.au/inquiries-and-research/productivity/submissions/")

```
